text:
How long have you this issue? To solve this problem, please check two NIS server ypserv - d and NIS customer ypbind - d and check if they can be placed in to troubleshoot mode. Besides debug, ypbind bolster verbose logging as well. Hope this answer helps you somehow.


https://domyhomeworkonline.net/do-my-high-school-assignment.php
